title: Lost Island
description: Lost Island is a survival-focused Minecraft mod with a unique world type.
body:
# 🌴 Lost Island **Lost Island** is a survival-focused Minecraft mod that introduces a brand-new world type designed to push your **resource management**, **planning**, and **decision-making** skills to the absolute limit. ![Lost Island Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9cea82499263372327eee786f18afcd80fa6c6eb_0.webp) --- ## 🌊 About You begin your journey **alone on a tiny island**, surrounded by an **endless ocean**. There are no villages. No rich biomes. No safety net. Food is scarce. Resources are limited. Every decision you make determines whether you **survive… or sink**. From time to time, **floating pots** drift across the ocean toward your island. They are your lifeline. ![Floating Pot](https://i.imgur.com/0ftA5J0.gif) Inside, you may find: - 🧱 **Essential resources** - 🍖 **Food and supplies** - 🎁 **Rare or unexpected items** Missing a pot could mean missing your **only chance to progress**. --- ## ⚙️ Features - 🌍 **New World Type** Start on a small, isolated island in an infinite ocean - 🏺 **Floating Pots** Randomly drifting loot containers with valuable supplies - 🌱 **Extreme Resource Scarcity** Every block matters - 🧠 **Strategic Survival Gameplay** Plan carefully and adapt to harsh conditions - ⚠️ **High Difficulty** Designed for players who enjoy serious survival challenges --- ## 🚧 Development Lost Island is currently in **early development**. - Bugs may be present - Some features may be unfinished or subject to change - Feedback and suggestions are **highly appreciated** --- ## 🎮 Gameplay The best way to understand **Lost Island** is to experience it yourself. Can you survive with almost nothing? Can you turn a lonely island into a thriving base? Only the strongest survivors will succeed. **Good luck — and survive.** ---
🆕 UPDATE 0.2 — DIVE DEEPER
![Sunken Diver](https://i.imgur.com/6gmLIfE.gif) *A sunken diver — a silent remnant of the past. Search the remains to obtain diving equipment and one of the lost journal pages.*
🌊 Diving
Update **0.2** introduces **new diving equipment**, allowing you to explore the ocean depths surrounding your island. ### 🤿 Equipment **Diver Goggles** ![Diver Goggles](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fbd9d54b22fda7b6ea77edbb13eb5775d0a7dd83_0.webp) **Oxygen Tanks** ![Oxygen Tank](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/af0f7cd15bb84462e87bf877268e900cc3c9a556_0.webp) At the bottom of the ocean, not far from your island, you may discover the remains of a **sunken diver**. Searching the remains gives you a chance to obtain this equipment — your key to underwater exploration and hidden resources. The ocean is no longer just an obstacle. **It’s an opportunity… if you dare to dive.**
---
🥥 Coconut
![Coconut](https://i.imgur.com/HVcL5GB.gif) Update **0.2** also introduces a new natural resource — the **Coconut**. Coconuts grow **naturally on palm trees**, making them one of the few renewable food sources available on the island. ### Uses - 🍽️ **Food Source** Smash it against a solid surface to break it open and eat it - 🎯 **Throwable Weapon** Throw it at enemies to deal damage and defend yourself In the harsh conditions of Lost Island, even a simple coconut can become a vital tool for survival. Nature provides — **but only if you know how to use it.**
---
🆕 UPDATE 0.3 — THE DRIFTING TRUTH
📖 **The Journal** Update **0.3** introduces a **Journal** — a silent witness to the past of Lost Island. At first, the journal is empty. Its pages are missing. Its story — forgotten. As it turns out, you were **not the first** to set foot on this island. Long before your arrival, another survivor lived here. They explored. They endured. And they wrote. In the end, driven by desperation or hope, they tore every page from their journal and cast them into the ocean — letting the currents decide whether their story would ever be known. ---
🌊 Scattered Pages
![ScrollPage](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/555426e1d58d330c5e446a7f4609cc1670471531_0.webp) *One of the torn journal pages.* The pages now drift across the sea, hidden in the world: - sealed in bottles - buried in ruins - lost among the waves Each page you find fills your journal… and reveals a **fragment of the truth**.
---
📜 New Mechanic — Journal Pages
![JournalButton](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e88ebf6a72ed69d5c5aa97153744ed395d094a79.png) ![JournalScreen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6cd620c9b65790f8f4408aa281a30ddb692eb54e_0.webp) - The journal starts empty - Pages are collected one by one - Every page tells part of the island’s history - Only by collecting **all pages** can you uncover the island’s secret The ocean is not just hiding resources anymore. It is hiding **memories**. Some stories refuse to stay buried. And this one… **is waiting to be read**.
